papers_mined.title: Melakarta Wikipedia
papers_mined.note: 72 parent ragas (janaka); 2×6×6 = 72 combinatorial; sampurna ragas — all 7 swaras ascending+descending; same notes both directions.

papers_mined.title: Melakarta Ragas Chart
papers_mined.note: 12 chakras × 6 ragas = 72 — Indu (moon, 1) / Netra (eyes, 2) / Agni (fires, 3) / Veda (4) / Bana (5) / Rutu (seasons, 6) / Rishi (sages, 7) / Vasu / Brahma / Disi / Rudra / Aditya.

papers_mined.title: 72 Melakarta Ragas SPARDHA
papers_mined.note: Mathematical derivation of 72: 6 R-G combinations × 6 D-N combinations × 2 (madhyama-sharp/flat); Katapayadi mnemonic encodes raga-number from name.

papers_mined.title: 72 Melakartha Eviolinguru
papers_mined.note: Each parent raga has prescribed swara pattern; janya ragas derive from parent by selective inclusion.
